Peel lemons, being careful not to peel pith (will cause bitterness).
In a small pot, fill with lemon peels and cold water (not part of mis en place).  Bring to a boil.
Once boiled, strain water and fill with cold water again.  Repeat x2 (x3 blanches in total).
After third blanch, strain water and add other ingredients.
Over medium heat, bring to a simmer then reduce heat to maintain simmer for ~45 mins.
Peels should be very tender and have a complex taste.
Strain liquid from solid peels, reserve each seperately in quart containers in the cooler.
